text: وَ مَا ذٰلِکَ‌ عَلَى‌ اللَّهِ‌ بِعَزِيزٍ

en.ahmedali: This is well within the power of God.
en.ahmedraza: And this is not at all difficult for Allah.
en.arberry: that is surely no great matter for God.
en.daryabadi: And for Allah that is not hard.
en.hilali: And for Allah that is not hard or difficult (i.e. very easy for Allah).
en.itani: And that is not difficult for God.
en.maududi: That is not at all difficult for Allah.
en.mubarakpuri: And for Allah that is not hard or difficult.
en.pickthall: And that is no great matter for Allah.
en.qarai: and that is not a formidable thing for Allah.
en.qaribullah: indeed, that is no great thing for Allah.
en.sahih: And that is not difficult for Allah.
en.sarwar: and that it is not at all difficult for God to replace you with another creature if He so wills?
en.shakir: And this is not difficult for Allah.
en.wahiduddin: that is no difficult thing for God.
en.yusufali: Nor is that for Allah any great matter.
fa.ansarian: و این [کار] بر خدا دشوار و گران نیست.
fa.ayati: و اين بر خدا دشوار نيست.
fa.bahrampour: و اين بر خدا دشوار نيست
fa.fooladvand: و اين [كار] بر خدا دشوار نيست.
fa.ghomshei: و این کار اصلا بر خدا دشوار نیست.
fa.khorramdel: و این کارِ (میراندن شما و به جهان گسیل داشتن دیگران) برای خدا مشکل نیست. [[«عَزِیز»: سخت و مشکل.]]
fa.khorramshahi: و این بر خداوند دشوار نیست‌
fa.makarem: و این کار برای خدا مشکل نیست!
fa.moezzi: و نیست آن بر خدا گران‌
fa.mojtabavi: و اين بر خدا دشوار نيست.
fa.sadeqi: و این کار بزرگ بر خدا(ی بزرگ) دشوار نیست.
